subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The Mother Book, on the Day of Return, with resounding voice summoned all to the divine horizon of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ام الکتاب در یوم ماب بآواز جلی کل را بافق ظهور الهی دعوت فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation
